target.title: docs: publish release notes for v2026.6.11
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The v2026.6.11 changelog currently presents a maintainer-oriented summary and
does not provide a reader-facing docs page for the release. Users need one
place to understand the practical reliability changes while maintainers still
retain source and contributor traceability.

## Why This Change Was Made

This replaces the v2026.6.11 changelog section with the reviewed public
changelog, adds the matching Mintlify release page, and links the page from the
release archive and docs navigation. The copy keeps the user-facing story
readable while preserving PR links and contributor credit.

## User Impact

Users can read the v2026.6.11 release story in the docs, with clearer coverage
of reply delivery, stuck sends, reconnects, model setup, sessions, clients, and
admin defaults. Technical readers can expand the source accordions for the
underlying changes and contributor credits.

## Evidence

- `pnpm format:docs:check`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `pnpm docs:check-links` (`broken_links=0`)
- `docs/docs.json` parses as valid JSON
- The changelog contains exactly one `## 2026.6.11` section
target.author: hannesrudolph
